title: Sadistic: The Exorcism of Lily Deckert
original_title: Sadistic: The Exorcism Of Lily Deckert
overview: For Lily Deckert, what first seems innocent becomes a possessive nightmare as the supernatural lurks within until it’s cast out of her.
